scripts.build: pnpm prepare:shared-sdk && pnpm build:packages && vite build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm prepare:shared-sdk && turbo run typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test:desktop:contracts: node --test scripts/desktop-toolchain-env.test.mjs && node --test scripts/shared-sdk-local-roots.test.mjs && node --test scripts/run-cargo-command.test.mjs && node --test scripts/release/desktop-targets.test.mjs && node --test scripts/run-desktop-release-build.test.mjs && node --test scripts/run-with-shared-sdk-mode.test.mjs && node --test scripts/package-scripts-contract.test.mjs && node --test scripts/prepare-shared-sdk-git-sources.test.mjs && node --test scripts/release-workflow-contract.test.mjs
scripts.tauri:dev: node scripts/run-with-shared-sdk-mode.mjs source -- pnpm --filter @sdkwork/notes-desktop run tauri:dev
scripts.tauri:build: node scripts/run-with-shared-sdk-mode.mjs source -- pnpm --filter @sdkwork/notes-desktop run tauri:build
scripts.tauri:info: node scripts/run-with-shared-sdk-mode.mjs source -- pnpm --filter @sdkwork/notes-desktop run tauri:info
scripts.release:desktop: node scripts/run-with-shared-sdk-mode.mjs git -- node scripts/run-desktop-release-build.mjs --phase bundle
scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
